youtube_videos.title: Warm Blooded And Cold Blooded Animals (1971)
youtube_videos.tags: Warm Blooded And Cold Blooded Animals (1971), Cold-blooded animals have changeable body temperatures, while warm-blooded animals have body temperatures that are more constant. Experiments show how environment affects the temperature of cold-blood
youtube_videos.description:
Cold-blooded animals have changeable body temperatures, while warm-blooded animals have body temperatures that are more constant. Experiments show how environment affects the temperature of cold-blooded animals, and how coverings help warm-blooded animals keep a more constant temperature.


We digitized and uploaded this film from the A/V Geeks 16mm Archive. Email us at footage@avgeeks.com if you have questions about the footage and are interested in using it in your project.
